fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the available cash balance was updated

fields.name: fromDepartment
fields.description: The department that originated the data (in this case, Accounts)

fields.name: toDepartment
fields.description: The department that received the message (in this case, Investments)

fields.name: subject
fields.description: Summary of the available cash balance update

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency of the available cash balance (in this case, USD)

fields.name: availableCashBalance
fields.description: Current available cash balance for the account

fields.name: asOfDate
fields.description: Date as of which the available cash balance was calculated

fields.name: details
fields.description: Breakdown of the available cash balance

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Additional information or instructions related to the available cash balance update
